---
title: "Dashboard Visual de OKRs Multi-Repositório"
author: "Time IA Submarina"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(jsonlite)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(plotly)
  library(reactable)
  library(crosstalk)
  library(lubridate)
})

json_path <- normalizePath("../data/dashboard-02.json", mustWork = TRUE)
okr_json <- fromJSON(json_path)

issues <- as_tibble(okr_json$issues)

issues <- issues %>%
  mutate(
    labels = sapply(labels, paste, collapse=","),
    assignees = sapply(assignees, paste, collapse=","),
    created_at = as.Date(created_at),
    closed_at = as.Date(closed_at)
  )

krs <- issues %>%
  filter(grepl("okr", labels, ignore.case = TRUE))
```

# 🔎 Filtros Globais

```{r}
shared <- SharedData$new(krs)

filter_select(
  id = "repo",
  label = "Repositório",
  shared,
  ~repo
)

filter_select(
  id = "assignee",
  label = "Responsável",
  shared,
  ~assignees
)
```

# 📊 Métricas principais

```{r}
total <- nrow(krs)
open <- sum(krs$state=="OPEN")
closed <- sum(krs$state=="CLOSED")

data.frame(
  Métrica=c("Total KRs","Abertas","Fechadas"),
  Valor=c(total,open,closed)
) %>%
reactable()
```

---

# 📈 Timeline de OKRs

```{r}
timeline <- krs %>%
  mutate(end = ifelse(is.na(closed_at), Sys.Date(), closed_at))

p <- ggplot(timeline,
aes(
y=reorder(title,created_at),
x=created_at,
xend=end,
yend=title,
color=state
)) +
geom_segment(size=4) +
theme_minimal() +
labs(
title="Timeline de KRs",
x="Tempo",
y=""
)

ggplotly(p)
```

---

# 🔥 Heatmap de produtividade

```{r}
heat <- krs %>%
  mutate(
    week=week(created_at),
    year=year(created_at)
  ) %>%
  count(year,week)

p <- ggplot(heat,aes(week,year,fill=n))+
geom_tile()+
scale_fill_viridis_c()+
theme_minimal()+
labs(
title="Heatmap de produtividade",
x="Semana",
y="Ano"
)

ggplotly(p)
```

---

# 🚀 Progresso por Repositório

```{r}
progress <- krs %>%
group_by(repo) %>%
summarise(
total=n(),
closed=sum(state=="CLOSED"),
progress=closed/total*100
)

p <- ggplot(progress,
aes(
reorder(repo,progress),
progress,
fill=repo
))+
geom_col()+
coord_flip()+
theme_minimal()+
labs(
title="Progresso por Repositório",
x="Repo",
y="%"
)

ggplotly(p)
```

---

# 🏃 Progresso por Sprint

```{r}
sprint <- krs %>%
mutate(
  sprint = floor_date(created_at, "week"),
  sprint = sprint - (as.integer(format(sprint, "%U")) %% 2) * 7
) %>%
group_by(sprint) %>%
summarise(
created=n(),
closed=sum(!is.na(closed_at))
)

p <- ggplot(sprint,aes(sprint,created))+
geom_line(size=1.2,color="orange")+
geom_line(aes(y=closed),color="green")+
theme_minimal()+
labs(
title="Progresso por Sprint",
y="KRs"
)

ggplotly(p)
```

---

# 📋 Tabela interativa de KRs

```{r}
reactable(
shared,
searchable=TRUE,
filterable=TRUE,
columns=list(
repo=colDef(name="Repo"),
title=colDef(name="KR"),
state=colDef(name="Status"),
assignees=colDef(name="Responsável")
)
)
```
